title: persea leucoxylon
intro: Persea leucoxylon, also known as the Neem tree, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The bark and leaves of the Persea leucoxylon contain medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Persea leucoxylon include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Persea leucoxylon is commonly used in herbal preparations such as oils, salves, and infusions to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
